description: This file defines REST API routes for managing a shopping list within a food recipe backend application. It includes operations such as retrieving the shopping list, adding ingredients from a recipe, toggling the checked state of items, removing individual items, and clearing all checked items. The routes are set up using FastAPI and interact with a SQLAlchemy ORM database.

methods.name: get_list(user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session))
methods.description: Retrieves the current user's shopping list items from the database, sorted by creation date.

methods.name: add_from_recipe( body: ShoppingAddFromRecipeRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session) )
methods.description: Adds ingredients from a specified recipe to the current user's shopping list.

methods.name: toggle_item( item_id: str, body: ShoppingToggleRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Toggles the checked state of a specific shopping list item.

methods.name: remove_item(item_id: str, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session))
methods.description: Removes a specific item from the shopping list.

methods.name: clear_checked(user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session))
methods.description: Removes all checked items from the user's shopping list.

ctags.name: add_from_recipe
ctags.signature: ( body: ShoppingAddFromRecipeRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session) )

ctags.name: remove_item
ctags.pattern: /^def remove_item(item_id: str, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_sessi/

ctags.name: toggle_item
ctags.signature: ( item_id: str, body: ShoppingToggleRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
